overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a rainy night walk through a neon-lit commercial plaza and urban street. The player moves from a covered outdoor dining area with a circular bar, ascends to a bustling street level surrounded by massive digital billboards, and descends into a subway station.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered outdoor dining plaza with circular neon bar

events.description: passing by seated patrons at the outdoor bar area

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered plaza past the circular neon bar and outdoor seating areas

notable_agents.action: patron seated at the bar under the umbrella
woman in white outfit walking away from the camera

entered.detail: large circular bar with glowing white countertop and purple neon stools
large patio umbrellas over outdoor dining tables
bright cyan and pink neon signs for various shops
large trees planted in the plaza providing partial cover

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a rain-sheltered commercial plaza featuring a prominent circular neon bar with purple stools. The player walks past outdoor seating areas with large umbrellas while neon shop signs glow in the background. Sparse pedestrians are visible, including a seated patron and a woman walking away.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with vertical garden wall and storefronts

events.description: moving from the open plaza into the narrower covered walkway section
approaching the stairway leading to the upper street level

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered pathway beside the illuminated vertical garden wall

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket walking toward the camera
security guard in reflective vest standing near the shops

entered.detail: tall wall covered in lush green vegetation with horizontal neon strip lighting
shop windows with bright interior lighting and merchandise displays
wide staircase leading up to the street level with illuminated edges

segments.scene_description: The player moves into a narrower covered walkway featuring a striking vertical garden wall with integrated neon lighting on the left. Various storefronts with illuminated windows line the right side. The path leads toward a stairway entrance visible in the distance as the player passes pedestrians walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairway transition from plaza to upper street level with massive billboards

events.description: exiting the covered area into open rain with full sky exposure
reaching the top of stairs and entering the upper street plaza with towering billboards

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide stairs from the lower plaza to the upper street level while rain falls openly

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with umbrella walking across the upper plaza

entered.detail: enormous curved digital screen displaying advertisements with checkered patterns
glass-enclosed walkway connecting buildings above street level
multiple stories of building facades covered in glowing advertisements

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a wide stairway from the sheltered lower level into the open rain, transitioning to an elevated street plaza. Massive curved digital billboards dominate the skyline, displaying vibrant advertisements. The environment opens up significantly with full sky exposure and towering cyberpunk architecture surrounding the area.

scene_state.functional_zone: major commercial intersection surrounded by monumental digital advertising towers

events.description: crossing the wet street intersection with glowing road markings
approaching the subway station entrance with orange railings

agents.ego_description: walking across the rain-slicked street surrounded by massive digital billboards on all sides

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red umbrella crossing the street
couple standing on the street corner near the subway entrance

entered.detail: stairway entrance leading underground with orange painted walls and teal railings
building-sized digital screens displaying fashion advertisements
tall illuminated posts with glowing white vertical strips

segments.scene_description: The player traverses a vast commercial intersection at street level, surrounded by monumental digital billboard towers covering entire building facades. The wet asphalt reflects the neon glow of countless advertisements. The segment progresses toward a subway entrance marked by orange walls and teal handrails, with pedestrians scattered throughout the crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: subway station entrance with graffiti-covered walls and littered floor

events.description: entering the subway stairwell leaving the rain and open street behind
transitioning from neon outdoor lighting to dimmer artificial underground lighting

agents.ego_description: descending the stairs into the subway station, moving from the rainy street into the underground passage

entered.detail: concrete stairs with teal handrails descending into the underground
orange and teal painted walls covered in spray paint and street art
dimly lit passage at the bottom of the stairs with scattered trash
fluorescent tube lights illuminating the stairwell

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the player descending into a subway station, transitioning from the open rain-soaked street to an enclosed underground environment. The stairwell features graffiti-covered orange walls and teal railings, with litter scattered across the concrete floor. The lighting shifts from vibrant neon to dimmer artificial fluorescent tubes as the player moves deeper into the underground corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, neon-lit commercial plaza into the open rain of a towering urban street. It begins within a rain-protected area, gliding past a circular neon bar with purple stools and outdoor seating under large umbrellas. As the camera moves forward, the space narrows into a covered walkway where a vertical garden wall with integrated neon lighting emerges on the left and illuminated storefronts line the right. The scene then shifts as the player ascends a wide stairway, leaving the shelter behind and stepping out into the falling rain. Finally, the environment opens up significantly into an elevated plaza dominated by massive curved digital billboards and towering cyberpunk architecture under a dark, open sky.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a towering, neon-drenched urban intersection down into the gritty depths of a subway station. It begins at street level, traversing a vast commercial crossing where monumental digital billboards cast vibrant reflections across the wet asphalt. As the camera moves through the scattered crowd, the open cityscape narrows toward a subway entrance defined by orange walls and teal handrails. The scene then shifts from the rain-soaked exterior to an enclosed underground environment, descending a stairwell marked by graffiti and scattered litter. Finally, the lighting transforms from the brilliant glow of city advertisements to the dim, flickering hum of artificial fluorescent tubes as the camera moves deeper into the underground corridor.
